about.title: About me
about.intro: Development is a big part of my path, but it’s not the whole story. Here’s what keeps me balanced day to day: energy, curiosity, and the need to keep moving.

music.title: Music & festivals
music.body: I love discovering artists, going to gigs, and soaking up festival crowds. Sharing a live moment with people around you is still one of the simplest, strongest feelings I know.

running.title: Running
running.body: Running is my reset: get outside, sync pace with breathing, push the bar a little each time. A solid way to step away from the screen and clear my head.

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.body: From story-driven solo games to sessions with friends, gaming is space for exploration, strategy, and sometimes friendly competition — another world where you improve, fail, and try again.

travel.title: Travel
travel.body: Travel widens the frame: new landscapes, new habits, and often better conversations. I like sketching an itinerary while leaving room for the unexpected.

nba.title: NBA
nba.body: I follow the NBA for the show, the standard of play, and team arcs that unfold over a season. Game nights are a steady rhythm to unwind and follow the story from tip-off to the final buzzer.

cooking.title: Cooking
cooking.body: I love cooking, discovering new recipes, and sharing meals with friends. Cooking is a way to relax and feel good.
